pi_items.source: Subjective role label; cannot be objectively verified against a ground truth dataset.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which explicitly creates and populates the 'web-apps' namespace.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which generates the markdown routing specification at this exact path.
Confirmed via verifier.py logic where 'passed' is set to 'score >= 70'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Kubernetes resources. It is confirmed that the target namespace is 'web-apps' and the routing specification is provided at '/home/ga/Desktop/routing_spec.md'. The passing score threshold is correctly verified as 70. All required application deployments (frontend, api, docs) and their internal port configurations are dynamically injected by the setup script.
